title: Vanilla SMP - DonutSMP
description: A clean, vanilla-inspired resource pack designed for PvP and SMP. Enhances visibility, performance, and clarity while keeping the classic Minecraft feel. Specifically made for DonutSMP
body:
Vanilla SMP - DonutSMP is a clean, vanilla-inspired resource pack designed for PvP and SMP (specifically DonutSMP). It keeps the classic Minecraft look while making textures clear and easy to read, perfect for both survival and combat. 

_______________________________________________________________________________________________
**This resource pack is a variant of [Vanilla SMP - Standard](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-smp-resourcepack) specifically made for DonutSMP**

- _Vanilla SMP - **Standard**: For general servers and survival gameplay._
- _Vanilla SMP - **DonutSMP**: Modified specifically for the DonutSMP server to prevent base-finding using bedrock patterns and block rotations._

________________________________________________________________________________________________
<details>
<summary>Features</summary>
  
- Slighly smaller sword
- Low fire
- Low side shield
- No explosion particles
- No eating particles (only golden apples and enchanted golden apples)
- No pumpkin blur
- Lower items
- Scary mobs? Not anymore! (Funny/silly mob faces)
- A different font
- Cobweb outline
- Better ice textures
- Old enchant glint (more visible)
- Custom hearts (only a different texture, no recolor)
- Less / smaller particles (totem pop and gust)
- Bedrock texture to  deepslate (only for DonutSMP variant) 
- Removed block rotations (only for DonutSMP variant)
- **There are a bunch more tiny improvements!**
</details>

________________________________________________________________________________________________
<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) (Smooth font, unobstrusive rain and a lot more)
- [Vanilla-Plus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-plus-jaronwqhd) (Totem texture, heart texture and silly mob faces)
- [Cobweb Outlines](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/web)
</details>

I will probably be making a discord server for questions and suggestions in the future.

**_NOTE:_ More gallery images for the textures that are not DonutSMP variant exlcusive on the normal version of this pack.**
